summary:
This joint resolution disapproves, under the Congressional Review Act, a Department of Energy rule titled “Energy Conservation Program: Energy Conservation Standards for Walk-In Coolers and Walk-In Freezers,” published in the Federal Register on December 23, 2024.

The resolution provides that the rule has no force or effect. As a result, the Department of Energy’s submitted energy conservation standards for walk-in coolers and walk-in freezers identified in that Federal Register notice are nullified.

The resolution was approved on May 9, 2025.
